_host_note: oncore.duvalclerk.com 301-redirects to or.duvalclerk.com (same IP 205.173.38.236); session cookies bind to or.duvalclerk.com so the OR host is canonical.
_search_flow_note: Live-verified 2026-06-10 (SKINNER): Duval is the Brevard-shape AcclaimWeb (Telerik/Kendo MVC) at root path. Disclaimer POST /search/Disclaimer {Disclaimer:true} -> form POST /search/SearchTypeName?Length=6 (name treeview) -> POST /Search/SearchTypePreName -> POST /Search/GridResults (JSON {data,total}). Single-POST search/SearchByName returns an HTML shell with 0 rows — do NOT use single_post flow.
_book_type_note: OR numeric is 2 on Duval (Brevard's is 3) — captured live from BookTypeInfoCheckBox values.

doc_image_url_pattern._image_token_note: LIVE-VERIFIED 2026-06-18 (BAJALIA): Duval/OnCore keys the image flow off the OPAQUE per-session token in the jump-detail page's hdnTransactionItemId (e.g. 'wj6bKvoRQzx...'), NOT the numeric grid TransactionItemId. Using the numeric grid token against Image/DocumentImage1 500s. image_token_from_detail=true forces the jump-detail GET so the opaque token is harvested; then StartImageRetrieval/{opaque}/0 (200) -> DocumentImage1/{opaque} (200, has WebAtalaCache href) -> WebAtalaCache/..._docPdf.pdf (200, %PDF). record_type=2 confirmed (jump 200; 27 -> 500).

apn_source: Duval PAO anchor (paopropertysearch.coj.net Detail.aspx?RE=) — see phase1_property_appraiser.json

selectors.result_rows: //tr[contains(@class, 't-row') or contains(@class, 'k-grid-row') or contains(@class, 't-state-default') or contains(@class, 't-alt')]
selectors.no_results: //*[contains(text(), 'No records') or contains(text(), 'No documents') or contains(text(), '0 record')]

notes: Duval County FL Clerk — 'OnCore'-branded Aptitude/Harris AcclaimWeb (Telerik/Kendo MVC) at root path on or.duvalclerk.com. LIVE-VERIFIED 2026-06-10 (Wave 2, SKINNER case): disclaimer flow pure-HTTP (POST /search/Disclaimer, fields {Disclaimer:'true'}); NO Cloudflare; NO anti-forgery token on search POSTs; geo-blocks non-US egress at TCP level (probe from IN egress timed out; US egress 200s). Search is the Brevard three_step_json shape with Duval-specific numerics: DEED=87, OR book=2. Default RecordDateFrom on the form is 1/1/1800 (deep index). Radios Both/Direct/Reverse. Test subject: SKINNER MICHAEL W + SALLY JANE, 4409 CROOKED BROOK CT, JACKSONVILLE FL 32224, RE# 167730-6710, vesting WD 7/15/2010 OR 15319-01154 (instr 2010174837 per intake).
